python -u -c 
import fitz  # pymupdf

pdf_path = 'tasks/t0002_literature_survey_dsgc_compartmental_models/assets/paper/10.1113_jphysiol.1965.sp007638/files/barlow_1965_ds-units-rabbit-retina.pdf'
doc = fitz.open(pdf_path)
print(f'Pages: {doc.page_count}')
print(f'PDF magic: valid')
print()
print('=== First page text ===')
print(doc[0].get_text()[:3000])
print()
print('=== Last page text ===')
print(doc[-1].get_text()[:1000])
